## ⚠️ Do Not Report Security Vulnerabilities Publicly

If you have found a security vulnerability, **please do not open a public issue**.

Instead, contact the maintainers privately by opening a [GitHub Security Advisory](../../security/advisories/new) or emailing the repository owner directly.

## Non-sensitive Security Questions

If your report is about a documentation gap, a hardening suggestion, or a question (not an exploitable vulnerability), you may describe it here:

## Description

## Potential Impact

## Suggested Fix
